titleStmt.title: SII 23.121: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 121. (A.R. No. 121 of 1907.) Āḻvārkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Vaṉṉiyappar temple—on the north wall of the central shrine

summary.p: This is an incomplete inscription. It records a gift of land tax-free as Kārāṇmai-dēvadānam at Kāḍēṟu, by which name probably Āḻvārkuṟichchi was then known, the north western quarter of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu, in favour of the temple of Tiruvaṉṉīchcharam-Uḍaiyār for the requirements of daily worship to the diety. The king's name is not given, only his title Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ, and the regnal year is lost. A tax mentioned incidentally—perhaps under exemptionis the one on the dēvaraḍiyār living in the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ muḷḷi nāṭṭu brahmadeya
m śrīrājarājaccaturvedimaṅkalattu vaṭamelpiṭākai kāṭeṟṟil tiruvaṉ
ṉiccaramuṭaiyār koyiṟ tevarkaṉmiyarkkum Ikkoyiliṟ tāṉattāṟ kum Ittevaṟku tirup
paṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nittanimantaṅkaḷukku kāṭeṟṟil It tevaṟku kārāṇmait teva
tāṉamāy ponta tiruveṇkāṭutevavāykkālukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu cakkaravāy
kālukku meṟku paṉṉiraṇṭāñ ceyyil kiḻakkaṭaiya nilaṅ kāṇi yum vaṭakku Aiñcāṅkaṇ
(ṅkaṇ)ṇāṟṟu meṟku Añcāñ ceyyum Āṟāñ ceyyum
ñceynilam Araimāvum vaṭakku patimuṉṟāṅkaṇṇā
Ittevaṟku tāṉampaṇṇiṉa nilaṅkaḷukkum kaṭamai Anta
ta Etirāmāṇṭumutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākavum Ikkoyil
ḷipāṭṭamum (te)tirumaṭaivaḷākattil tevaraṭiyār variyum ma
Digital edition of SII 23.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
